ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frame_transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition event */,
  "who_runs" TEXT /* Indicates who is running the transition (e.g., sender or receiver) */,
  "frame_accepted" TEXT /* The frame status accepted by the system */,
  "frame_emitted" TEXT /* The frame status emitted by the system */,
  "to_network_layer" TEXT /* Indicates whether the transition involves the network layer */,
  "source_network_layer" INTEGER /* Source network layer for the transition */,
  "destination_network_layer" INTEGER /* Destination network layer for the transition */,
  "transition_status" TEXT /* Status of the transition (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transition occurred */,
  "warning_level" TEXT /* Warning level for the transition (e.g., low, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_transitions_source_network_layer FOREIGN KEY ("source_network_layer") REFERENCES network_layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_transitions_destination_network_layer FOREIGN KEY ("destination_network_layer") REFERENCES network_layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transition that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES frame_transitions ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report contents */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the network layer (e.g., Link Layer, Network Layer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functions of the network layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transition_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the transition event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transition_logs_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES frame_transitions ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., latency, throughput) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Performance metric being measured */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transition associated with the metric value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES frame_transitions ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
